calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Aug-24-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name and Gender.
Commissioner: Sue Kaplan, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert, CSR: Angie Diner
Petitioner Ronald Anthony Soria appeared in proper was sworn and examined.

No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing. It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct, and sufficient and that the petition should be granted in part and denied in part. Petition is granted as to name change only at the request of Petitioner and denied without prejudice as to gender change.
The Court grants the petition for Change of Name to : JJ PEDALIN SORIA.

Decree signed in open court.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Jul-25-2006 Reset To Aug-24-06 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 218 For Order To Show Cause
